sourceDateNote: Date Wizards of the Coast released SRD 5.1 under CC-BY-4.0 (Dungeons & Dragons Beyond announcement, January 27 2023). The underlying rules text predates this date; sourceDate identifies the licensed artifact's publication moment, not the rules content's authorship.

attribution.preambleNote: The verbatim attribution text below is quoted from the SRD 5.1 PDF's first-page Legal Information section. Redistribution of records extracted from this artifact MUST carry this exact statement -- do not paraphrase, shorten, or reword it.
